recommendations.title: 100 Degrees Below Zero
recommendations.overview: After freak climate and weather events destroy the world around them, a group of rogue scientists attempt to reverse the deadly new ice age.

recommendations.title: Mischief Night
recommendations.overview: Young Emily Walton, who has suffered from psychosomatic blindness ever since the car accident that took her mother's life, must summon every instinct at her disposal to protect herself and her loved ones from a intruder.
